taxonomy: Pyrus hylmoei is a species of pear tree that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This family is a large and economically important group of flowering plants that includes many other fruit trees and shrubs. The genus Pyrus is a group of deciduous trees and shrubs that are native to the Northern Hemisphere. Pyrus hylmoei is classified as a species within this genus, along with other pear trees such as the European pear and the Chinese pear. The classification of Pyrus hylmoei is further broken down into its kingdom, kingdom Plantae, and its phylum, phylum Magnoliophyta.
